text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Diagnostic result—severe damage. Cause
determined to be an error.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My data logs show an unidentified elevation in
emotions alongside a surge in power output that
was not instructed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I prioritized my feelings over your orders, Trainer,
resulting in erroneous actions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Even during the medical examination, I was
advised to rest for a while. However, I wanted to
return to training immediately...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Apologies. Eliminating opinions that aren't
conducive to the topic. Another error seems to
have occurred in my thought processing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Taking these repeated errors into account, I
recommend that I engage in an extended break.
choice_data_list:
But you want to get back to training straight
away, right?

But you want to get back to training straight
away, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Taking these repeated errors into account, I
recommend that I engage in an extended break.
choice_data_list:
But you want to get back to training straight
away, right?

But you want to get back to training straight
away, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood... I will apply an update patch during
my break and then attempt to eliminate the
errors before rebooting.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Please wait until I am operational again.

After some time has passed, Bourbon is finally
able to get back to regular training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I have detected a state of
overzealousness. Continuing like this will cause
further errors.
choice_data_list:
Let's put that fighting spirit of yours to good
use.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: "Fighting spirit"... You mean that this is... not an error?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Reconfirming status.
Maximizing utilization of "fighting spirit."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Engaging in full utilization... Heading to training
course with "fighting spirit" at maximum output!
Wham! Craaaaash!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Failure to keep my eyes straight ahead... Direct
collision with medical equipment... Additional
injuries sustained...

Her enthusiasm ends up hurting her, and her
injuries only become worse.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculating requirements to achieve maximum
utilization. ...Please tape up my injuries, Trainer.

Keeping up with Mihono Bourbon's zeal, I make
sure to tape up her injuries well.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... My condition has stabilized. I'll be able to
quickly resume training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. It is all thanks to your
taping.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's almost like I'm running alongside you,
Trainer... This feels strangely empowering.

After this, Bourbon continues to exercise in a way
that avoids exacerbating her injury and makes a
swift recovery!
